panels.description: makespan − critical-path cost: the overhead the protocol adds on top of the theoretical floor.

targets.expr: (sum by (mozart_protocol) (histogram_sum(last_over_time(mozart_dag_makespan_milliseconds{mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_protocol=~"$protocol", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range]))) / sum by (mozart_protocol) (histogram_count(last_over_time(mozart_dag_makespan_milliseconds{mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_protocol=~"$protocol", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range])))) - (sum by (mozart_protocol) (histogram_sum(last_over_time(mozart_dag_critical_path_milliseconds{mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_protocol=~"$protocol", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range]))) / sum by (mozart_protocol) (histogram_count(last_over_time(mozart_dag_critical_path_milliseconds{mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_protocol=~"$protocol", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range]))))

panels.title: Coordination cost by protocol (ms)

panels.description: Stacked: critical path (unavoidable work) + coordination cost (protocol overhead). The full bar is the makespan; the coordination segment shows how much of it is overhead.

targets.expr: sum by (mozart_protocol) (histogram_sum(last_over_time(mozart_dag_critical_path_milliseconds{mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_protocol=~"$protocol", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range]))) / sum by (mozart_protocol) (histogram_count(last_over_time(mozart_dag_critical_path_milliseconds{mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_protocol=~"$protocol", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range])))

(sum by (mozart_protocol) (histogram_sum(last_over_time(mozart_dag_makespan_milliseconds{mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_protocol=~"$protocol", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range]))) / sum by (mozart_protocol) (histogram_count(last_over_time(mozart_dag_makespan_milliseconds{mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_protocol=~"$protocol", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range])))) - (sum by (mozart_protocol) (histogram_sum(last_over_time(mozart_dag_critical_path_milliseconds{mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_protocol=~"$protocol", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range]))) / sum by (mozart_protocol) (histogram_count(last_over_time(mozart_dag_critical_path_milliseconds{mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_protocol=~"$protocol", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range]))))

panels.title: Makespan breakdown by protocol (critical path + coordination = makespan)

targets.expr: sum by (mozart_protocol) (last_over_time(mozart_messages_total{mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_protocol=~"$protocol", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range])) / sum by (mozart_protocol) (last_over_time(mozart_worker_tasks_total{outcome="completed", mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_protocol=~"$protocol", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range]))

sum by (mozart_protocol) (last_over_time(mozart_storage_ops_total{mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_protocol=~"$protocol", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range])) / sum by (mozart_protocol) (last_over_time(mozart_worker_tasks_total{outcome="completed", mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_protocol=~"$protocol", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range]))

histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by (mozart_protocol) (last_over_time(mozart_worker_task_duration_milliseconds{mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_protocol=~"$protocol", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (mozart_protocol) (last_over_time(mozart_worker_task_duration_milliseconds{mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_protocol=~"$protocol", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range])))

histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by (mozart_protocol) (last_over_time(mozart_transport_deliver_duration_milliseconds{mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_protocol=~"$protocol", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (mozart_protocol) (last_over_time(mozart_transport_deliver_duration_milliseconds{mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_protocol=~"$protocol", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (mozart_protocol, op) (last_over_time(mozart_storage_op_duration_milliseconds{mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_protocol=~"$protocol", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range])))

panels.title: Storage op latency p95 by op (ms)

panels.title: Cost vs fan-out (branch width) — one line per protocol

targets.expr: (sum by (mozart_fanout_mean) (histogram_sum(last_over_time(mozart_dag_makespan_milliseconds{mozart_fanout_mean!="", mozart_protocol="baseline", mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range]))) / sum by (mozart_fanout_mean) (histogram_count(last_over_time(mozart_dag_makespan_milliseconds{mozart_fanout_mean!="", mozart_protocol="baseline", mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range])))) - (sum by (mozart_fanout_mean) (histogram_sum(last_over_time(mozart_dag_critical_path_milliseconds{mozart_fanout_mean!="", mozart_protocol="baseline", mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range]))) / sum by (mozart_fanout_mean) (histogram_count(last_over_time(mozart_dag_critical_path_milliseconds{mozart_fanout_mean!="", mozart_protocol="baseline", mozart_scenario=~"$scenario", mozart_nodes=~"$nodes", mozart_latency_transport_deliver_mean=~"$comms", mozart_latency_storage_save_mean=~"$storage"}[$__range]))))
